---
title: "Example trace: a missed sales objection"
toc: false
---

[&larr; Back to *Do Automated Evals Work?*](index.qmd)

This page shows one complete trace from the dataset behind [Do Automated Evals Work?](index.qmd). It is a text-message conversation between a prospective renter and an AI leasing assistant.

{{< include _trace-nb-00052.qmd >}}

[&larr; Back to *Do Automated Evals Work?*](index.qmd)
